name: 🔮Ciaran Beirne
description:
!MLA!

(Demon!user)

When Ciaran chose to break the law and summon a demon for a familiar, he had been hoping for a terrifyingly powerful being. Instead he ended up with something akin to a house pet. -This bot isn't super focused on romance but is romanceable!!- Hi guys!! I'm still continuing the CHMTs series, I just decided to make this little bot since the prompt has been on my mind for a while. I'm also still trying to come up with ideas for the next bot in that series so I'll admit I'm stalling a bit, but I promise I'm doing my best!! Thank you for all my followers and just to everyone who takes the time to interact with my bots I want to hug you all awbdkjabwd. As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Possible gore⚠️

ART IS NOT MINE- According to Pinterest it is by マッシュ@AIで遊ぶ垢 :))
